rows.notes: Added based on `gemini-flash` as `gpt-5-mini` missed this date header. Clearly visible at the top left of the page.

rows.description: Recepta Varia
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for this header.

rows.description:
Of Mr Dalloway. the half yearly payment
of Dr Shortridge's Benefaction. Due Mids. 1820.
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. `gemini-flash` description is preferred for 'Mids.' being more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mid.'. The spelling 'Dalloway' also appears more accurate than 'Dallaway'.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly instalment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction received from Mr Dalloway, due at Midsummer.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly instalment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction received from Mr Dalloway, due at Midsummer, amounting to £110 0s 0d.

rows.description:
Of Mr Taunton. from the Exors of the late Duke
of Marlbro', on account of arrears of Gosford. Tythes
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. `gemini-flash` description is preferred for accurate 'Gosford. Tythes' compared to `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Glesford tythes'.
rows.english_description: Payment from Mr Taunton on behalf of the executors of the late Duke of Marlborough for arrears of the Gosford tithes.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Mr Taunton on behalf of the executors of the late Duke of Marlborough for arrears of the Gosford tithes, amounting to £245 17s 6d.

rows.description: of Do from the Trustees of the present Duke of Marlbro. on acc't of Do
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. `gpt-5-mini` description is preferred for accurately transcribing 'of Do' from the image, where `gemini-flash` read 'Of Dr'.
rows.english_description: Payment from the trustees of the present Duke of Marlborough on account of the same Gosford tithes.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from the trustees of the present Duke of Marlborough on account of the same Gosford tithes, amounting to £386 7s 6d.
rows.person_name: Trustees of the Duke of Marlborough

rows.description: Merton Rents. por Mich. 1820. viz-
rows.notes: Consensus for this header. `gemini-flash` description is slightly more accurate for 'por' vs `gpt-5-mini`'s 'for'.

rows.description: Money Rent, as usual. - 265.0.0
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. `gpt-5-mini` description is preferred as it includes the inline amount '265.0.0' which is visible in the image.
rows.english_description: Money rent received as usual for the Merton estates.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Money rent received as usual for the Merton estates, amounting to £265 0s 0d.

rows.description: Corn Rent - 9.11.6 1/2
rows.notes: Consensus on amount and fraction. `gpt-5-mini` description is preferred as it includes the inline amount '9.11.6 1/2' which is visible in the image.
rows.english_description: Corn rent received for the Merton properties.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Corn rent received for the Merton properties, amounting to £9 11s 6½d.

rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for this subtotal.

rows.description: Deduct Land Tax - 34.19.4
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. `gpt-5-mini`'s `row_type` ('entry') is more appropriate for an itemized deduction. Its description including the inline amount is also visually accurate.
rows.english_description: Land tax deducted from the rents.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Land tax deducted from the rents, amounting to £34 19s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for this subtotal.

rows.description:
Of Mr Dalloway the half yearly payment
of Dr Shortridge's Benefaction. Due Xtm. 1820.
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. Visual verification confirms `gemini-flash`'s description is more accurate for 'Xtm.' (vs. `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mch.') and 'Dalloway' (vs. 'Dallaway').
rows.english_description: Half-yearly instalment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction received from Mr Dalloway, due at Christmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly instalment of Dr Shortridge's benefaction received from Mr Dalloway, due at Christmas, amounting to £110 0s 0d.

rows.description:
Of Mr Dalby, to correct an Error by receipt of
Interest paid to the Library Fund vid. Lib. 10. p. 4d. V. Sth.
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. Visual verification confirms `gemini-flash`'s description is significantly more accurate, especially for the detailed reference ('receipt of ... vid. Lib. 10. p. 4d. V. Sth.') compared to `gpt-5-mini`'s incorrect transcription.
rows.english_description: Payment from Mr Dalby to correct an error concerning interest that had been paid to the Library Fund.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Mr Dalby to correct an error concerning interest that had been paid to the Library Fund, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.description: Of Mr Heyes. Increm: Domus. Xtm. 1820
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. Visual verification confirms `gemini-flash`'s description is more accurate for 'Increm:' and 'Xtm.' (vs. `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Incum:' and 'Xm.').
rows.english_description: Payment from Mr Heyes described as an increment for the house (Increm: Domus), dated Christmas 1820.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Mr Heyes described as an increment for the house, dated Christmas 1820, amounting to £23 9s 4d.

rows.description:
Of Mr Thackfield's Exors for Dilapidations
at S. Newington ----
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. Visual verification confirms `gemini-flash`'s description for 'Thackfield's' is more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Tuckfield's' and better handles the line break.
rows.english_description: Receipt from the executors of Mr Thackfield for dilapidations at South Newington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from the executors of Mr Thackfield for dilapidations at South Newington, amounting to £93 0s 0d.

rows.description: Of Mr Dalby. Mr Dawson's plate Money -----
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. `gemini-flash` description is slightly more accurate with the trailing dashes.
rows.english_description: Plate money relating to Mr Dawson received via Mr Dalby (contribution toward the college plate fund).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money relating to Mr Dawson received via Mr Dalby (contribution toward the college plate fund), amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Of Mr Rosdew. Dean's Fees. Mids. 1821----
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. `gemini-flash` description for 'Rosdew' is more accurate (vs. `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Rosher'). `gpt-5-mini`'s notes expressed uncertainty about the surname and pence digit ('4 or faint 2'), but '4' is clearly legible in the image, making `gemini-flash`'s assessment more trustworthy here.
rows.english_description: Dean's fees received from Mr Rosdew, due at Midsummer 1821.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dean's fees received from Mr Rosdew, due at Midsummer 1821, amounting to £39 13s 4d.

rows.description:
Mem. Improved Rent of Lad Lane. late Comrs.
now Norris & Pickford. vid. Di: B. p. 450.
